analysis_result: One-way ANOVA p-value = 4.585e-13 (F = 16.330, df = 6, 101) comparing per-sample mean beta at Other (non-CpG-island) probes across the 7 methylation subgroups in 108 samples.
denominator_used: N = 108 samples across 7 Methylation_Group clusters (PremalignantNF_G3=29, Cutaneous NF_G7=21, Benign_NF-G4=20, Cutaneous NF_G6=12, Sporadic Spinal NF_G5=10, MPNST_G1=8, MPNST_G2=8); mean computed across 629933 non-Island CpG probes per sample.
assumptions_made: 'Other Probes' defined as all EPIC manifest probes where Relation_to_UCSC_CpG_Island != 'Island' (i.e. N_Shore, S_Shore, N_Shelf, S_Shelf, OpenSea, or blank); per-sample mean beta computed by averaging beta values across those probes present in GSE207207_average_beta_values.txt.gz (NaN-safe); one-way ANOVA via scipy.stats.f_oneway across 7 methylation subgroup categories from the Clinical Data sheet; Tumor_ID values were whitespace-stripped so that 'M3398 ' in the beta header matched 'M3398' in the clinical sheet (yielding 108/108 matched samples).
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - Clinical Data sheet of 41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx: 108 samples (Tumor_ID, Methylation_Group).
   - GSE207207_average_beta_values.txt.gz: 771133 CpG probes x 108 samples.
   - GPL21145_MethylationEPIC_15073387_v-1-0.csv.gz (skiprows=7): 868565 manifest rows.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - All 108 samples in the beta matrix. Each mapped to Methylation_Group via Tumor_ID join after stripping whitespace.
   - Missing group assignments: 0; samples in ANOVA: 108.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Other Probes: manifest rows where Relation_to_UCSC_CpG_Island != 'Island' (Shore/Shelf/OpenSea/blank).
   - Non-Island probes in manifest: 712079; intersect with beta index: 629933.
   - Per-sample metric: mean beta across all Other Probes (NaN-safe).

D. COMPUTATION
   - Filtered beta matrix to non-Island probes, computed column-wise mean (skipna=True).
   - Grouped per-sample means by Methylation_Group (7 categories).
   - Applied scipy.stats.f_oneway on the 7 group value arrays.

E. RESULT
   - F statistic = 16.330015
   - p-value = 4.584705e-13

F. CAVEATS
   - Uses precomputed average beta matrix from GEO; Fig 1d right panel is the same data.
   - 'Other Probes' follows the data-context definition (everything not annotated as Island).
   - No additional probe filtering beyond the published matrix (no sex-chromosome, cross-reactive, or SNP-proximal exclusion).
